title: Euro Lost 1.08% to $1.0427 — Data Talk | Morningstar
text:
Euro Lost 1.08% to $1.0427 — Data Talk
Euro/dollar: 1.0427 dollars per euro (0.9591 euro per dollar)
--This week the euro lost 1.08% vs. the dollar
--Down for three straight weeks
--Down 3.77% over the last three weeks
--Largest three-week percentage decline since Friday, July 15, 2022
--Down seven of the past eight weeks
--Today the euro lost 0.45% vs. the dollar
--Down for four straight sessions
--Down 1.62% over the last four sessions
--Largest four-day percentage decline since Thursday, Nov. 14, 2024
--Longest losing streak since Thursday, Nov. 14, 2024, when the market fell for five straight sessions
--Down nine of the past 11 sessions
--A new 52-week low
--Lowest five pm New York rate since Wednesday, Nov. 30, 2022
--Off 6.85% from its 52-week high of 1.1194 hit Friday, Aug. 23, 2024
--Down 4.76% vs the dollar from 52 weeks ago
--Month-to-date it is down 4.21% vs the dollar
--Year-to-date the euro is down 5.54% vs the dollar
Data based on 5 p.m. ET values
Source: Tullett Prebon and Dow Jones Market Data
(END) Dow Jones Newswires
November 22, 2024 17:33 ET (22:33 GMT)
